arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy hints at Odsonne Edouard decision ahead of January transfer window

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa’s Liverpool stint in jeopardy: Potential Serie A return on the horizon
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa's adventure with Liverpool has not unfolded as hoped, and with the January transfer window approaching, a premature departure is becoming increasingly plausible. The 27-year-old Italian winger recently made his return to the pitch after nearly three months of absence, featuring in a League Cup match against Southampton.
